joke: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts!
Why did the coffee file a police report? It got mugged!
Why did the bicycle fall over? It was two-tired!
Why did the math book look sad? It had too many problems!
Why don't some couples go to the gym? Because some relationships don't work out!
Why don't seagulls fly over the bay? Because then they'd be bagels!
Why did the computer go to the doctor? Because it had a virus!
Why did the tomato turn red? Because it saw the salad dressing!
Why did the music teacher get locked out of her classroom? Because her keys were inside the piano!
Why did the snowman call his dog Frost? Because Frost bites!
Why did the belt get arrested? Because it was holding up a pair of pants!
Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole in one!
Why did the banker break up with his girlfriend? He lost interest!
Why did the clock get kicked out of class? It was always ticking people off!
Why did the librarian get kicked off the plane? Because it was overbooked!
Why did the ghost go to the party? Because he heard it was going to be a boo-last!
Why did the ocean break up with the pond? She thought he was too shallow!
Why did the pillow go to the doctor? It was feeling a little down!
Why did the candle get promoted? Because it was always burning the midnight oil!
Why did the lamp break up with the lightbulb? It found someone brighter!
Why did the pencil break up with the paper? It felt their relationship was pointless!
Why did the window break up with the door? It couldn't handle the pane!
Why did the mirror get a promotion? It really knew how to reflect on things!
Why did the shoe go to therapy? It had too many sole-searching issues!
Why did the tree go to the dentist? To get a root canal!
Why did the mountain break up with the hill? It found their relationship too rocky!
Why did the elevator break up with the staircase? It was tired of all the ups and downs!
Why did the phone break up with the charger? It felt drained by the relationship!
